response.overview: Normi, who does not care about her appearance and dislikes fashion, causes concern for her mother and sister, Nuri, as they worry it will affect the perception of their beauty products. After sending her writing to several companies, Normi finally receives a job offer as a permanent writer. Normi begins her first day at the company with an introduction to her colleagues. They criticize Normi's appearance. Datin Shana asks Normi to change her appearance in order to maintain her reputation as a writer.
response.title: Normi Kemball
